mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_maintenance_suggestion ( device_id, health_record_id, suggestion_date, maintenance_type, priority_level, suggested_start_date, suggested_end_date, related_spare_parts, estimated_cost, status, reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{healthRecordId}, #{suggestionDate}, #{maintenanceType}, #{priorityLevel}, #{suggestedStartDate}, #{suggestedEndDate}, #{relatedSpareParts}, #{estimatedCost}, #{status}, #{reason}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO biz_maintenance_suggestion ( device_id, health_record_id, suggestion_date, maintenance_type, priority_level, suggested_start_date, suggested_end_date, related_spare_parts, estimated_cost, status, reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.deviceId}, #{item.healthRecordId}, #{item.suggestionDate}, #{item.maintenanceType}, #{item.priorityLevel}, #{item.suggestedStartDate}, #{item.suggestedEndDate}, #{item.relatedSpareParts}, #{item.estimatedCost}, #{item.status}, #{item.reason}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.device_id, s.health_record_id, s.suggestion_date, s.maintenance_type, s.priority_level, s.suggested_start_date, s.suggested_end_date, s.related_spare_parts, s.estimated_cost, s.status, s.workorder_id, s.requisition_id, s.reason, s.reject_reason, s.handled_by, s.handled_at, s.created_at, s.updated_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance, h.health_score AS current_health_score, h.risk_level AS current_risk_level, p.failure_probability AS failure_probability, u.username AS handler_name FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion s LEFT JOIN equipment e ON s.device_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ai_device_health h ON s.health_record_id = h.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT device_id, failure_probability FROM ai_fault_prediction WHERE (device_id, prediction_date) IN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(prediction_date) FROM ai_fault_prediction GROUP BY device_id ) ) p ON s.device_id = p.device_id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.handled_by = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.device_id, s.health_record_id, s.suggestion_date, s.maintenance_type, s.priority_level, s.suggested_start_date, s.suggested_end_date, s.related_spare_parts, s.estimated_cost, s.status, s.workorder_id, s.requisition_id, s.reason, s.reject_reason, s.handled_by, s.handled_at, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion s WHERE s.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY s.suggestion_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion WHERE status = 'PENDING'

SELECT s.id, s.device_id, s.health_record_id, s.suggestion_date, s.maintenance_type, s.priority_level, s.suggested_start_date, s.suggested_end_date, s.related_spare_parts, s.estimated_cost, s.status, s.reason, s.created_at, s.updated_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name, e.importance_level AS device_importance, h.health_score AS current_health_score, h.risk_level AS current_risk_level FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion s LEFT JOIN equipment e ON s.device_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ai_device_health h ON s.health_record_id = h.id WHERE s.status = 'PENDING' AND s.priority_level = 'HIGH' ORDER BY s.suggestion_date ASC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.device_id, s.health_record_id, s.suggestion_date, s.maintenance_type, s.priority_level, s.suggested_start_date, s.suggested_end_date, s.related_spare_parts, s.estimated_cost, s.status, s.reason, s.created_at, s.updated_at, e.code AS device_code, e.name AS device_name FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion s LEFT JOIN equipment e ON s.device_id = e.id WHERE s.status = 'PENDING' AND s.suggested_end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{daysAhead} DAY) ORDER BY s.suggested_end_date ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_maintenance_suggestion SET status = 'ACCEPTED', workorder_id = #{workorderId}, requisition_id = #{requisitionId}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_maintenance_suggestion SET status = 'REJECTED', reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_maintenance_suggestion SET status = 'COMPLETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion GROUP BY status
SELECT priority_level AS priorityLevel, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion WHERE status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY priority_level

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ACCEPTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) END AS acceptance_rate FROM biz_maintenance_suggestion WHERE status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'REJECTED')
